title: The season God doesn't skip
caption:
There's a season God doesn't advertise. No stage, no announcement, no audience.

Just a man showing up to the same faithful thing, day after day, while it looks like nothing is happening.

That's the season He does His best work.

Most men want the platform before the preparation. But what holds the weight of a bigger life is what got built in the hidden one — the early mornings, the word kept when no one asked, the hard work done without applause.

Take care of what's already in your hands. Tend it faithfully. "Whoever can be trusted with very little can also be trusted with much." — Luke 16:10

And learn to wait without going sideways. The waiting season isn't wasted time. It's the formation.

Save this for the week it doesn't feel like it's going anywhere.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #thework #formation #christianity #scripture
